# Shotput

> Shotput template syntax reference: source placeholders, rules (conditionals/loops),
> sections, commands, subagents, database sources. Use for building high-fidelity AI agent prompts.

## Template Authoring

- [Shotput Template Guide for LLMs](docs/llm-template-guide.txt): Full syntax reference, high-fidelity patterns, examples, pitfalls

## Key Source Types

- Files, directories, globs, regex — resolved relative to `templateDir`
- HTTP — `{{https://...}}`, domain-restricted
- S3/R2 — `{{s3://bucket/path}}`, credentials via env or builder
- SQLite — `{{sqlite://path/db.sqlite/query:SQL}}`, requires `.sqlite()` on builder
- Redis — `{{redis:///get:key}}`, `{{redis:///keys:pattern}}`, requires `.redis(url)` on builder
- Skills — `{{skill:name}}`, local or remote (GitHub)
- Functions — `{{TemplateType.Function:/path}}`, disabled by default
